overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a modern urban downtown area at sunset. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses a wet street, and explores a parking lot area overlooking a highway, with Korean signage visible on storefronts and tall office towers silhouetted against an orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk next to arched commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a pink building with arches, observing the Korean storefronts across the wet street

entered.detail: large commercial building with repeating archways on the ground floor and potted plants near entrance
multi-story office building with ground-floor Korean restaurant signage including '온달할머니'
mature deciduous trees planted along the sidewalk median
recently rained-on concrete sidewalk reflecting the orange sunset light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a city sidewalk beside a distinctive pink building with arches. The camera walks forward along wet pavement reflecting the golden sunset, looking across the street toward a commercial building with illuminated Korean signage. Sparse trees line the median while the empty sidewalk stretches ahead toward a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk approaching parking lot

events.description: steps off the curb and begins crossing the multi-lane street toward the commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the wet asphalt toward the parking lot on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the street, heading left to right

entered.detail: concrete barrier with metal railings overlooking the highway below
stairwell entrance leading down to a pedestrian underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wet street at a crosswalk, moving from the sidewalk into an open plaza area. A dark car passes by on the left as the camera approaches the opposite curb, revealing a highway overlook with concrete railings and an underground passage entrance. The Korean commercial building now looms directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking multi-lane highway with skyscraper views

events.description: moves from street-level plaza to elevated walkway overlooking the highway traffic below
camera tilts sharply upward to frame the tall skyscrapers against the orange sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated path overlooking highway traffic, then stopping to look up at the towering office buildings silhouetted against the sunset

entered.detail: multi-lane highway with cars and trucks moving in both directions
cluster of modern high-rise office buildings with reflective glass facades
tall palm trees visible near the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway, the camera overlooks a busy multi-lane highway with moderate traffic flowing below. The view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers against a dramatic orange sunset. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the height of the buildings before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban parking lot surrounded by commercial storefronts

events.description: camera tilts down from the skyscrapers and resumes walking forward through the parking lot

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty wet parking lot toward the ground-floor storefronts with illuminated signage

entered.detail: wet asphalt parking lot with white line markings and puddles reflecting neon signs
row of commercial shops with illuminated Korean signage including 'ELECTRONICS' and other neon signs

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the skyscrapers and continues walking through an empty parking lot surrounded by tall buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon signs of ground-floor storefronts, including an electronics shop and various Korean businesses. The segment ends as the camera approaches the building entrances across the lot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet city sidewalk through a bustling urban overlook and into a neon-lit parking area under a sunset sky. It begins beside a pink arched building, moving along wet pavement that reflects golden light as the camera faces a commercial building with illuminated Korean signage. As the camera crosses the street at a crosswalk, the scene opens into a plaza where a passing car leads the way toward a concrete highway overlook and an underground passage. The perspective then shifts to an elevated walkway, glancing down at the flowing traffic of a multi-lane highway before tilting upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers silhouetted against a dramatic orange horizon. Finally, the camera tilts back down to traverse an empty parking lot, where the wet asphalt mirrors the colorful neon signs of electronics shops and Korean businesses before approaching the building entrances.
